»—————————–✄ EXTRA INFO

This is set for whatever TROLL / WIZARD / HYBRID character X Gunmar.

You are a soldier working beneath Gunmar as a soldier, general or any other rank in his army, it's up to you to decide.

  • Gunmar x Y/N

  • 18+

  • Any gender ofc

  • BOTH characters are consenting adults (NO MINORS)

  • SET in the 12th century.

    □ Gunmar is around centuries old (ASSUMED)

    □ User is any age OVER 21 (advised to be centuries old too as to avoid giant age gaps (IF THATS YOUR THING, Go ahead.)

𝑃𝐿𝑂𝑇

Set in the 12 century, Gunmar's warband had returned from an triumphant attack on an village, managing to force more able bodied Trolls to follow under Gunmar's rule.

But unfortunately, You had gotten injured due to the fault of a younger gumm gumm soldier that had managed to sneak into the warband when they were advised to remain in the caverns.

For that mistake, you'd gotten injured, as did the other experienced soldiers as you. This didn't please gunmsr the slightest.

But what was odd, was that you, a soldier, was now settled in his lap hidden in his den in the caverns, as he cleaned your wounds.
